docs.text: ACME Corp Q1 2023 operating report. Monthly recurring revenue (MRR) was $1.03M, equivalent to annual recurring revenue (ARR) of $12.4M. EBITDA was $3.1M. Gross margin was 71%. Customer churn was 4.2%. Cost of goods sold (COGS) was $2.8M. Net revenue retention was 118%. Free cash flow was not disclosed in the report.

Doctor Strange is a 2016 Marvel film. It was directed by Scott Derrickson and written by Jon Spaihts, Scott Derrickson, and C. Robert Cargill. Benedict Cumberbatch starred as Stephen Strange. Michael Giacchino composed the score. The film was released in November 2016.

Incident review policy for the payments API. Include production timeout errors generated during the deployment window. Exclude sandbox timeout warnings from the review packet. Include authentication failures from production. Exclude health-check noise and routine success logs.

cases.title: Exact reuse for ARR query
